title: ミイラハント～目覚めよ狩人！～

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm walking down the hallway, and Tamamo Cross
stops me as I'm about to walk by her.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you. If ya happen to spot Oguri havin' some
trouble, would ya mind lendin' her a hand?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
We're preparing for the haunted house we talked
about before. You know, the mummy hunt?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
We're the mummies, and Oguri's the hunter. That
makes us enemies, so we can't exactly help her
out.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
If the opposin' teams get too chummy, there's
gonna be no tension. That's why we're taking
steps to make sure that doesn't happen. So
thanks in advance!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Hm... I guess the elementary school won't have a
stairwell in this spot. So, if I want to leave the
building, then...
choice_data_list: Are you lost, by any chance?
Are you lost, by any chance?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I was practicing for the haunted house by
imagining this is the elementary school we're
gonna be in for the actual event. But then I got
confused...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Gruhhhhh!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hey, Inari. I'm lost... Which way's the exit?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Whaddya askin' me for?! We're enemies, remember?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Just ask that trainer over there. You're supposed
to be brawlin' with us mummies.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I asked because I know I can rely on all of you...
And by the way, three-on-one isn't really fair.
Let's go two-on-two instead.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Geez... Yer killin' me over here. All right, how
'bout this? If you can beat all us mummies right
now, we'll go two-on-two.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
In order to win, you either gotta use that toy gun
to wipe out all us mummies, or get all the way to
the Three Goddesses statue safely. Whaddya
say?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...So I just have to win?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ohoho, makin' it sound easy. Y'know I'm just
gonna camp at the goal and ambush ya, right?
Which means it's a race to the Three Goddesses
statue.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: And if we're racin', ya got no chance against me!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: If we're racing... I'm gonna be the winner!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oguri, that's the wrong way! It's this way!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Bang! ...Gotcha. That's Creek down!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, not half bad! Looks like she's finally takin'
this seriously!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I knew it! There's nothin' like a race to light a fire
under Oguri's butt!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff... Get back here!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I'm feelin' it! This pressure! Oguri's gettin' closer!
But first place is—

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: HAAAAA!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: MINE!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
You lose, Oguri! Team Mummy for the win! Total
victory!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Grrr!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
It looked like you were focusin' real hard on
Tama, so I was able to tag you on the back too!
Faster than runnin' to the statue, right?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Ya got beat to the statue and ya got tagged... It's a shutout, Oguri.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I'm not gonna lose again! I'll think of a way to
beat you guys and win for sure!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
That's the spirit. The hunter's supposed to guide
the guests and help 'em out, not us.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hehe. You did wonderfully, Oguri. Atta girl! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Eyyy, Creek! Until we're done practicin', yer
forbidden from coddlin' anyone!
